mission_package_name: SVN2-05 / SVN2-06 SG-01 Test Mission Draft
source: Owner-provided chat screenshot and station configuration screenshots
status: Draft - satellite operator and owner confirmation required

mission_context.owner_note_cn: 现在测试 2-0506 星比较方便；北美两行代号；雷达星融配置；配好后下周给 2-4 个测试时间段安排任务。
mission_context.test_window_request: Next week, 2-4 candidate test time windows required from satellite operator / scheduling party.

rf_and_baseband_summary.matched_filter: Root raised cosine / square-root raised cosine indicated in GUI
rf_and_baseband_summary.agc_level_dbm: 500 as shown in GUI - unit/value requires confirmation

path_1.derandomization_order: Decode first, derandomize later / 先解扰后译码 as displayed requires confirmation

path_2.derandomization_order: Decode first, derandomize later / screenshot shows disabled path

platform_interpretation.recommended_station: SG-01 because provided screenshots are specifically SG-01 station configuration and data center frequency is 8212 MHz, within SG-01 X-band downlink range 8000-8400 MHz.
platform_interpretation.ai_role: AI should check completeness and generate configuration checklist. Owner manually arranges task after satellite operator provides 2-4 candidate time windows.
human_required_decisions: Confirm the exact satellite identity for SVN2-05 and SVN2-06.
Confirm whether 68378 / 68377 are NORAD IDs, internal line codes, or another satellite operator code.
Confirm TLE or OMM for both satellites.
Confirm RF polarization for 8212 MHz downlink.
Confirm whether GUI value 1200 MHz IF should replace or coexist with earlier 1270 MHz IF configuration.
Confirm whether rate is 800 Mbps or 900 Mbps for the final SG-01 test configuration.
Confirm whether Gray2 in this GUI replaces Gray1 in earlier configuration screenshots.
Confirm whether LDPC 7/8 is the final decode setting.
Confirm output data path and transfer destination.
Confirm next week 2-4 available test windows from satellite operator.

mission_creation_blockers: Configuration conflict between earlier 1270 MHz IF / 900 Mbps / Gray1 package and this 1200 MHz IF / 800 Mbps / Gray2 screenshot requires confirmation.
next_action_for_owner: Ask satellite operator to confirm if 68378 and 68377 are NORAD IDs or internal codes.
Ask satellite operator for TLE / OMM for SVN2-05 and SVN2-06.
Ask satellite operator to provide 2-4 candidate test windows next week in UTC.
Ask station/operator to confirm final SG-01 configuration: IF frequency, bit rate, mapping, LDPC, polarization and output path.
After confirmation, create two test missions: one for SVN2-05 and one for SVN2-06, both using SG-01.
